commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Captain, instead of Moses, whom they could not bring over to their criminal design, no more than Aaron, Josue, Caleb (Haydock)
Some imagine the rebels wanted to choose themselves a king, (Calmet) or even another god. (Drusius)
Every community acknowledges the necessity of having one at the head. (Worthington)
